news.headline: Scholar Rumeysa Ozturk returns to Turkiye following Trump deportation push

news.headline: PM, Erdogan emphasise importance of utilising ‘window of opportunity’ for lasting regional peace
news.summary:
<p>Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif and Turkish President Recep Tayyip Erdogan on Friday emphasised the importance of “effectively utilising the current window of opportunity to advance durable and lasting regional peace” amid the ongoing war in the Middle East.</p>

news.headline: Carney Courts Investors to Reduce Canada’s Economic Dependence on U.S.
news.summary: Prime Minister Mark Carney has set up a meeting and a new office to speed project approvals and make Canada more attractive to investors.

news.headline: Lutnick Says Canada Trade Deal Needs to Be Reworked Ahead of Talks
news.summary: Howard Lutnick, President Trump’s commerce secretary, derided Canada’s trade strategy and said a North American deal needed to be reworked.

news.headline: Starmer’s Credibility Just Took Another Body Blow Over the Mandelson Scandal
news.summary: Prime Minister Keir Starmer appears to have been kept in the dark repeatedly over Peter Mandelson, the Jeffrey Epstein associate — fueling an image of weakness.
